selection_policy: prefer diverse rule families over claimed performance
retain TradingView Strategy Tester reports only as external comparison evidence
require local OS reproduction before validation or S3 discussion

verification_notes: Each URL was observed as a public TradingView strategy page in web research.
Open-source status was observed from page metadata/search result snippets; source code itself was not copied.
Strategy Tester metrics are not captured yet and must be captured per candidate before local reproduction comparison.
No candidate is validated, approval eligible, or promotion eligible.
